title: Your votes, their victory: 2025 Best of Oudtshoorn winners announced
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Over the past four months,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Over the past four months, the people of Oudtshoorn have spoken – and it is our privilege to announce and congratulate the winners of the 2025 Best of Oudtshoorn Readers’ Choice Awards!","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Over the past four months, the people of Oudtshoorn have spoken – and it is our privilege to announce and congratulate the winners of the 2025 Best of Oudtshoorn Readers’ Choice Awards!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Your nominations and votes for your favourite businesses allow us to showcase the pride and joy of our community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The enthusiastic response from our loyal readers reaffirms just how valuable this project is – not only in celebrating excellence – but also uplifting and supporting businesses in our beautiful town.","html":"The enthusiastic response from our loyal readers reaffirms just how valuable this project is – not only in celebrating excellence – but also uplifting and supporting businesses in our beautiful town."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A big salute to every nominated business and our heartfelt congratulations to each of the 2025 category winners – you truly make Oudtshoorn proud!","html":"A big salute to every nominated business and our heartfelt congratulations to each of the 2025 category winners – you truly make Oudtshoorn proud!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Looking ahead, we’re excited to share that the 2026 Best of Oudtshoorn Readers’ Choice Awards will officially kick off in May 2026.","html":"Looking ahead, we’re excited to share that the 2026 Best of Oudtshoorn Readers’ Choice Awards will officially kick off in May 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"See all the 2025 winners here.","html":"See all the 2025 winners here."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Winners 2025"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Education, Lessons & Coaching","html":"Education, Lessons & Coaching"},{"type":"list","items":["Best Creche / Playschool: Wesbank Pre-Primêr","Best Extramural Lessons & Coaching: Rugga Roots Oudtshoorn","Best High School: Langenhoven Gimnasium","Best Primary School: Laerskool Wesbank","Best Tertiary Education Institute: Emmanuel Verpleegskool"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Entertainment & Hospitality","html":"Entertainment & Hospitality"},{"type":"list","items":["Best Bed & Breakfast: Thylitshia Villa Country House","Best Event Venue: Buffelsdrift Game Lodge","Best Hotel / Boutique Hotel: Buffelsdrift Game Lodge","Best Outdoor Activity: Wilgewandel Holiday Farm & Restaurant","Best Place for a Family Outing: Wilgewandel Holiday Farm & Restaurant","Best Weekend Escape: Buffelsdrift Game Lodge"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Food & Drink","html":"Food & Drink"},{"type":"list","items":["Best Biltong: Karoo Lusern Slaghuis","Best Breakfast: Enchanted Coffee Shop","Best Burger: Nostalgie Restaurant","Best Coffee Shop: Plato Coffee – Oudtshoorn","Best Family Friendly Restaurant: Wilgewandel Holiday Farm & Restaurant","Best Outdoor Dining: Buffelsdrift Game Lodge Restaurant","Best Pizza: Cango Woodfired Pizza","Best Pub: Route 62 Bar & Grill","Best Restaurant: Nostalgie Restaurant","Best Takeaway: Cango Woodfired Pizza"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Health, Beauty & Wellness","html":"Health, Beauty & Wellness"},{"type":"list","items":["Best Beauty / Health Spa: Ticvah Beauty","Best Gym: Oxi Gym","Best Hair Salon: Monsoon the Salon Oudtshoorn","Best Nail Salon: Christa’s Beauty and Hair Clinic"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Medical","html":"Medical"},{"type":"list","items":["Best Dentist: Dr Gys Kleyn Inc","Best Family Doctor / GP: Dr Wessel Vermeulen en Vennote","Best Health Care Centre / Clinic: Mediclinic Klein Karoo Hospital","Best Hospital: Mediclinic Klein Karoo Hospital","Best Optometrist: Oudtshoorn Oogkundiges Weldon Optical","Best Pharmacy: Queen’s Mall Pharmacy","Best Physiotherapist: Karien Visser Physiotherapy"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Motoring","html":"Motoring"},{"type":"list","items":["Best Automotive Parts & Toyota","Best Panel Beaters: CP Nel Bakwerke","Best Tyre Fitment Centre: Tyremart Oudtshoorn"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pets","html":"Pets"},{"type":"list","items":["Best Kennels:
